name: Heroic Inspiration
entries: If you ({@variantrule Player Character|XPHB|a player character}) have Heroic Inspiration, you can expend it to reroll any die immediately after rolling it, and you must use the new roll.
If you gain Heroic Inspiration but already have it, it's lost unless you give it to a {@variantrule Player Character|XPHB|player character} who lacks it.
